diagrams.title: Dematerialization Spectrum
diagrams.description: Shows the continuum from physical products to fully virtual products, illustrating strong and weak dematerialization
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the range of dematerialization levels

diagrams.title: Product Chain with Dematerialization Points
diagrams.description: Lifecycle diagram showing where in the product chain dematerialization interventions can occur
elements: Raw Material Extraction - reduced material input
diagrams.purpose: Identifying intervention points for material reduction

diagrams.title: Rebound Effect Visualization
diagrams.description: Diagram showing how efficiency gains can be offset by increased consumption
diagrams.purpose: Understanding why dematerialization benefits may be reduced

diagrams.title: Digitalization to Dematerialization Flow
diagrams.description: Shows how digital technologies enable dematerialization across sectors
diagrams.purpose: Mapping technology enablers to dematerialization outcomes
